creator: trashcan@ellael.org
text:
Hi Sergey,

the pkg version is:

mike> pkg -v
1.15.9

I filed this bug report running pkg-1.15.8.

Today I checked again, and I cannot reproduce this issue an longer. pkg-1.15.9 does install those files.

Sorry for the noice, you may close this bug.

Kind regards,
Michael
